description: RWX is a CI/CD platform focused on running and validating software workflows, including agent-assisted development loops and container image builds. It provides cloud-hosted workflow execution, caching, vault/secrets management, and related developer tooling.
summary: RWX exposes a documented CLI (`rwx`) and a bearer-token-authenticated HTTP API surface for dispatches, vaults, and Captain-related cloud API usage; no public GraphQL spec or usable MCP connect endpoint was discoverable on `rwx.com`.
